metrics.revenueGrowthReason: Revenue increased from ₹54,098 Cr to ₹1,19,845 Cr over the last 5 years (CAGR: 22%).
metrics.profitGrowthReason: Net Profit grew from ₹6,924 Cr to ₹14,381 Cr over 5 years (CAGR: 20.05%).
metrics.epsGrowthReason: EPS increased from ₹20.09 to ₹41.73 over the last 5 years, tracking a 20.05% compound annual growth.
metrics.debtReason: Leverage is slightly elevated at 1.2. Interest coverage is 3.3x. Watch for interest rate fluctuations.
metrics.cashFlowReason: Operating Cash Flow is ₹12,655 Cr. Free Cash Flow is ₹7,861 Cr. Positive free cash flow facilitates reinvestment and dividends.
metrics.roeReason: ROE stands at 12.6% in the latest year. An ROE above 15% is generally considered high-performing for capital deployment.
metrics.roceReason: ROCE is 9% in the latest year. It exceeds the cost of capital, indicating value creation for shareholders.
metrics.peValuationReason: Stock P/E (22.39) is trading at a premium (+15% ) over the industry P/E (19.5). Growth expectations are baked into the price.
metrics.promoterReason: Promoter holding is 38% (Zero pledging). High promoter ownership reflects strong skin in the game.
metrics.dividendReason: Dividend Yield is 2.2%. The company has a consistent history of sharing corporate profits.
metrics.bookValueReason: Price to Book value is 4.2x (Current Price: ₹934.5 vs Book Value: ₹222.5).
metrics.quarterlyGrowthReason: Latest quarter sales reached ₹32,957 Cr (up 12.2% YoY) and profit reached ₹4,026 Cr (up 12% YoY).
metrics.annualGrowthReason: Annual revenues increased by 22% YoY, and net profits expanded by 30.7% YoY.
metrics.piotroskiReason: The company scores 7/9 on Piotroski criteria, reflecting extremely strong financial operations and balance sheet health.
metrics.altmanZReason: Altman Z-Score is 2.83, placing the company in the 'Grey Zone'. Solvency is stable but operational buffers should be monitored.
metrics.grahamReason: Graham Number is ₹457.07, which is 104% below the current price of ₹934.5. The stock trades at a premium.
metrics.freeCashFlowReason: Free Cash Flow of ₹7,861 Cr signifies capital available for acquisitions, debt retirement, and equity distributions.
metrics.opMarginReason: Operating Profit Margin (OPM) is 15.6%, demonstrating healthy pricing power and cost controls in production.
metrics.netMarginReason: Net Profit Margin (NPM) stands at 12%, indicating the percentage of revenue successfully converted to net earnings.
metrics.returnRatiosReason: Return on Equity is 12.6%, Return on Capital Employed is 9%, and Return on Assets is 6.3%. These reflect solid asset utilization.

managementQuality.managementComments: Management of Apollo Micro Systems Ltd remains optimistic about the upcoming fiscal year. Capital expenditure of ₹13420 Cr is planned for operational expansion. We expect raw material pricing pressures to ease, stabilizing margins.

reasons: Revenue growing consistently with a strong 5-year CAGR.
Net profits are expanding steadily, signaling growing operational efficiency.
Strong free cash flow generation supports business growth and liquidity.
Stock is priced at a premium (P/E: 22.39 vs Industry: 19.5). Valuation provides a low margin of safety.
